---
title: ""
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: FALSE
---

<div style="text-align: center;">
![](`r here::here("Images", "Aims_at_USC for light background.png")`){width=75%}
![](`r here::here("Images", "animated_umap.gif")`){width=50%}
</div>

# Mission

**AIMS&#64;USC** (*AI Methods for Spatial Omics Research at USC* ) is dedicated to developing and applying cutting-edge AI methods for spatial analysis, fostering interdisciplinary collaboration across the University of Southern California to transform how we understand tissues, disease, and regeneration.

# Support

**AIMS&#64;USC** is supported by the **USC Office of Research and Innovation** [Research Catalyst Program](https://rii.usc.edu/funding/) focused on Interdisciplinary Artificial Intelligence, and is part of the collaborative teams at the [USC Kidney Research Center](https://keck.usc.edu/kidney-research-center/) and the [Center for Translational Exposomics Research](https://keck.usc.edu/cter/).

**AIMS&#64;USC** would not have been possible without investments from:

##### [**Southern California Environmental Health Sciences Center**](https://scehsc.org/)

##### [**Southern California Clinical and Translational Science Institute**](https://sc-ctsi.org/)

##### [**USC Norris Comprehensive Cancer Center Cores**](https://uscnorriscancer.usc.edu/)

##### [**Donald E. and Delia B. Baxter Foundation**](https://keck.usc.edu/research-funding/intramural-funding-opportunities/programs-administered-by-ksom/)
